basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. + 4 years experience OR 3 years Engg. Diploma + 4 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Technician: B.Sc. degree with 4 years of relevant experience OR a 3-year Engineering Diploma with 4 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Project Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Technician Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Kanpur Project Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Technician: B.Sc. degree with 4 years of relevant experience OR a 3-year Engineering Diploma with 4 years of relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Kanpur Project Technician Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Technician post at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technician position at IIT Kanpur is July 5, 2026. Ensure all your details are correctly filled and submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Technician role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Technician position, candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree with 4 years of relevant experience or a 3-year Engineering Diploma along with 4 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Project Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technician position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technician post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 14,400 to Rs. 36,000, as per the pay scale mentioned in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technician position announced by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technician role at IIT Kanpur primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Technician recruitment at IIT Kanpur is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Technician position at IIT Kanpur is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016. The recruitment is for positions within this institute.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. However, it is advisable to check the detailed official notification for any specific state-wise eligibility criteria.
